name: Bow Ties with Eggplant Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until al dente.
2. Heat garlic, onion, and cayenne pepper in vegetable stock until fragrant.
3. Add eggplant and simmer for 5 minutes until softened.
4. Stir in tomatoes, basil, oregano, and additional vegetable stock to cover.
5. Simmer for an additional 20 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
6. Drain the pasta and toss with the sauce.
